title: Current Editor Missing Integration Hint
acceptance: inspectIntegrationBootstrap detects the active editor from supported runtime hints and flags when that editor's repo-local ATM integration is missing, even if other adapters are already installed.
ATM welcome, next, and doctor surface a concrete add/verify recommendation for the detected editor instead of only warning when zero adapters are installed.
The install hint remains silent when the detected editor already has a healthy installed adapter.
Validator coverage proves the current-editor-missing path and keeps the warning contract stable.
deliverables: editor detection logic for integration bootstrap
notes:
Owner: `integration-pack`
Priority: `P1`
Allocation: Follow-up to cross-editor onboarding smoke where Copilot did not receive a missing-integration prompt because another adapter was already installed.
Coordination: Keep detection heuristics centralized in CLI integration bootstrap logic so welcome/next/doctor stay in sync.
Status: `done`
Validation: `node --experimental-strip-types scripts/validate-skill-templates.ts`; `node --experimental-strip-types scripts/validate-integration-adapter.ts`; `ATM_EDITOR_ID=copilot` smoke on `doctor`, `next`, and `welcome --dry-run`.
Change: Added current-editor detection plus precise add/verify recommendations across integration bootstrap surfaces.
